title: Altered Cassette Discs
description: A slightly modified version of Cassette Discs 1.0 by Monobloc_Chair
body:
This project was practice for my own pack [Lad's Cassettes](https://modrinth.com/project/K6BM5tRC) and has been archived as I won't be supporting it anymore. If you would like to continue this project (Altered Cassette Discs), see the lisence.

This is a slightly modified version of [Cassette Discs 1.0](https://modrinth.com/project/HUjNokY8) that leaves the jukebox alone, adds the newer music discs, and slightly adjusts the outline on the cassette tape textures.


<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>

See License

</details>


<details>
<summary>About Updates</summary>

I usually only test pack updates on the latest version of Minecraft. Resource packs are almost always backwards and forwards compatible. If you experience any issues or if the pack doesn't work, please report it to me.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Credits</summary>

[Monobloc_Chair](https://modrinth.com/user/iBf9gmXf) for creating the original pack

</details>
